A brief narrow tornado touched down in York County PA, within East Hopewell Township. The tornado began on the edge of a corn field north of Century Farms Rd and caused damage to the two fields before it crossed the road and snapped off and/or uprooted a couple dozen trees. The tornado lifted just north of Fulton School Rd.

A brief narrow tornado touched down in York County PA, within East Hopewell Township. The tornado began on the edge of a corn field north of Century Farms Rd and caused damage to the two fields before it crossed the road and snapped off and/or uprooted a couple dozen trees. The tornado lifted just north of Fulton School Rd. The period of the Tornado event was 2 minutes.

..Blacklick Township Tornado... Rating: EF1 Estimated Peak Wind: 107 mph Path Length /statute/: 0.32 miles Path Width /maximum/: 100 yards Fatalities: 0 Injuries: 0 Start Date: 08/12/2023 Start Time: 08:49 PM EDT Start Location: 2 W Colver / Cambria County / PA Start Lat/Lon: 40.5516 / -78.8199 End Date: 08/12/2023 End Time: 08:51 PM EDT End Location: 1 W Colver / Cambria County / PA End Lat/Lon: 40.5498 / -78.8143 Survey Summary: At approximately 8:49 PM on 8/12/2023, a brief EF-1 tornado touched down to the northwest of the intersection of Snake Road and Reed Hall Road in Blacklick Township, Cambria County. The tornado snapped off, and uprooted hundreds of trees along a 0.32 mile path before lifting just to the west of Reed Hall Road at 8:51 PM. Sporadic straight line wind damage was noted to the north and south of the tornado path as well.
Multiple trees down reported in Cambria Twp. Time estimated by radar.

..Cambria Township Tornado... Rating: EF0 Estimated Peak Wind: 85 mph Path Length /statute/: 0.20 miles Path Width /maximum/: 100 yards Fatalities: 0 Injuries: 0 Start Date: 08/12/2023 Start Time: 08:55 PM EDT Start Location: 2 ESE Colver / Cambria County / PA Start Lat/Lon: 40.5317 / -78.7583 End Date: 08/12/2023 End Time: 08:57 PM EDT End Location: 2 ESE Colver / Cambria County / PA End Lat/Lon: 40.5311 / -78.7545 Survey Summary: At approximately 8:55 PM on 8/12/2023, a brief EF-0 tornado touched down to the west of Gresh Road southeast of Colver in Cambria Township, Cambria County. The tornado uprooted trees along a 0.2 mile long path and damaged a house and outbuilding on Gresh Road. The tornado lifted at approximately 8:57 PM.
